Class Comments

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Comments
public class Comments extends Object
Comment manager for blocks.

Please note that the methods provided here support all implemented positions by the engine as defined by the YAML spec.

However, when dumping the document, depending on the flow style currently in use, comments at some positions will be lost. That is a limitation imposed by the engine and might be patched in future releases. Always refer to the corresponding position documentation for detailed information regarding these requirements and compatibility notes.

  • Field Details

    • BLANK_LINE

      public static final org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine BLANK_LINE
      Comment representing a blank line. Cannot be used with Comments.Position.INLINE.

  • Constructor Details

    • Comments

      public Comments()

  • Method Details

    • get

      @Nullable public static List<org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine> get(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull NodeRole node, @NotNull Comments.Position position)
      Returns comments at the given position.

      This method will return null or an empty List, indicating there are no comments at the position.

      The returned list can be modified with changes reflected in the document tree immediately. Please note that not all comment types are allowed at all positions. Always refer to the Comments.Position documentation when managing comments in order to avoid content loss and runtime exceptions.

      Parameters:
      block - the block used to retrieve comments
      node - node from which to retrieve comments
      position - position of the retrieved comments
      Returns:
      the comments

    • get

      @Deprecated @Nullable public static List<org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine> get(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull Comments.NodeType node, @NotNull Comments.Position position)
      Deprecated.
      Replaced by get(Block, NodeRole, Position) and subject for removal.
      Returns comments at the given position.

      This method will return null or an empty List, indicating there are no comments at the position.

      The returned list can be modified with changes reflected in the document tree immediately. Please note that not all comment types are allowed at all positions. Always refer to the Comments.Position documentation when managing comments in order to avoid content loss and runtime exceptions.

      Parameters:
      block - the block used to retrieve comments
      node - node from which to retrieve comments
      position - position of the retrieved comments
      Returns:
      the comments

    • set

      public static void set(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull NodeRole node, @NotNull Comments.Position position, @Nullable List<org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine> comments)
      Sets the given comments at the given position.

      To remove comments, use remove(Block, NodeType, Position) instead. Alternatively, pass either null or an empty List as the parameter.

      Setting a list returned by get(Block, NodeType, Position) is not necessary as the changes made to that list are automatically reflected in the document structure.

      Please note that not all comment types are allowed at all positions. Always refer to the Comments.Position documentation when managing comments in order to avoid content loss and runtime exceptions.

      Parameters:
      block - the block for which to set
      node - node to attach to
      position - position at which to set
      comments - the comments to set
      See Also:
      • create(String, Position)

    • set

      @Deprecated public static void set(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull Comments.NodeType node, @NotNull Comments.Position position, @Nullable List<org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine> comments)
      Deprecated.
      Replaced by set(Block, NodeRole, Position, List) and subject for removal.
      Sets the given comments at the given position.

      To remove comments, use remove(Block, NodeType, Position) instead. Alternatively, pass either null or an empty List as the parameter.

      Setting a list returned by get(Block, NodeType, Position) is not necessary as the changes made to that list are automatically reflected in the document structure.

      Please note that not all comment types are allowed at all positions. Always refer to the Comments.Position documentation when managing comments in order to avoid content loss and runtime exceptions.

      Parameters:
      block - the block for which to set
      node - node to attach to
      position - position at which to set
      comments - the comments to set
      See Also:
      • create(String, Position)

    • remove

      public static void remove(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull NodeRole node, @NotNull Comments.Position position)
      Removes all comments at the given position.
      Parameters:
      block - the block for which to remove
      node - node to which the comments are attached
      position - position of the comments to remove

    • remove

      node - node to which the comments are attached
      position - position of the comments to remove

    • add

      public static void add(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull NodeRole node, @NotNull Comments.Position position, @NotNull List<org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine> comments)
      Adds the given comments to already existing comments at the given position.

      Please note that not all comment types are allowed at all positions. Always refer to the Comments.Position documentation when managing comments in order to avoid content loss and runtime exceptions.

      Parameters:
      block - the block to add to
      node - node to which the comments should be added
      position - position at which the comments should be added
      comments - the comments to add
      See Also:
      • create(String, Position)

    • add

      public static void add(@NotNull Block<?> block, @NotNull NodeRole node, @NotNull Comments.Position position, @NotNull org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine comment)

      Please note that not all comment types are allowed at all positions. Always refer to the Comments.Position documentation when managing comments in order to avoid content loss and runtime exceptions.

    • create

      @NotNull public static org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.comments.CommentLine create(@NotNull String comment, @NotNull Comments.Position position)
      Creates a comment. For blank lines, please use BLANK_LINE.
      Parameters:
      comment - the actual comment
      position - position at which the block will be placed
      Returns:
      the comment line
